candidates.why: Dedicated operating expense line above Operating income. Per rule, include in XSGA as well when R&D is separately reported and not clearly embedded in selected SG&A bucket, so that XSGA-XRD removes it.
Clear SG&A/overhead component and the best direct match for administrative overhead.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Depreciation component specifically excluded from XSGA per instructions.

variables.notes: Selected explicit overhead component 'General and administration costs'. Included 'Research and development costs' as well because it is a separate above-EBIT operating expense line and does not appear clearly embedded in G&A; this aligns with the XSGA minus XRD construction. Excluded 'Other operating expenses' because it appears contaminated by impairment and FX-type items in some years. Excluded depreciation row per rule.

Excluded the supplemental lease-interest row to avoid double counting with 'Interest expenses attributable to lease liabilities'.
